title: Oatly
tagline: Irreverent, scrappy, loud — and the home page is captured at ~20px section padding with zero product photography. Variants test compositional rest and a singular pastel band, brand-tight.

direction.phrase: Mode A brand-faithful presales redesign of oatly.com homepage. Pin palette and typography. Three differentiated variants.
movements: density: ~20px sections → packed brand-tight (~48px) for presales surface
variant differentiation: distinct compositional theses (no reskins)
F-002 placeholders: required (captured zero product photography)

fontDeck.name: brand-inherited
fontDeck.value: Oatly's seven custom typefaces, fluid clamp scale

originalCritique: The brand surface is genuinely unmistakable — italic-serif claims, grid-paper, sharp 0px corners, irreverent voice. But the captured home runs at ~20px section padding (very tight); the page lacks a single content moment that earns rest. Worse, the homepage captures zero product photography — every image is brand-system, og fallback, or hand-drawn icon. The page is loud but never composed.

variants.name: Conservative refresh
variants.thesis: Same IA, packed brand-tight at ~48px instead of ~20px. The grid-paper, italic-serif claims, sharp corners, and hand-drawn motifs survive verbatim — the page just gets enough air to read.
variants.fix: Same IA, packed brand-tight at ~48px instead of ~20px. The grid-paper, italic-serif claims, sharp corners, and hand-drawn motifs survive verbatim — the page just gets enough air for the voice to land. Each section finally has a single moment instead of four shouting at once.

variants.name: Compositional shift
variants.thesis: Same palette, same type. Different homepage thesis: open with one italic-serif claim full-bleed, no nav, no card grid. The voice is the page; the product range follows.
variants.fix: Same palette, same type. Different homepage thesis: the page opens with one italic-serif claim full-bleed — no nav, no card grid, no rolling promo. The voice IS the page. The product range follows below the fold as a single composed strip, not a wall of SKUs. The brand always wrote like this; finally the home composes like this.

variants.name: Bold direction
variants.thesis: Push one pastel further: a singular drenched-pastel band carries the hero (cream-yellow #fdcf85 or one of the seven brand pastels). Brand-tight density holds elsewhere.
variants.fix: Push one pastel further. A singular drenched-pastel band carries the hero — cream-yellow #fdcf85 or one of the seven brand pastels — at full saturation, not as background. Brand-tight density holds elsewhere; the grid-paper recedes to a single section. The pastel finally has the weight the brand has been distributing thinly across cards.
